# REGINALD - MX COG Registry
> Registry for Genuine Information, Notarised Authentication, and Legitimate Documentation

This is a machine-readable registry of COGs (Contextual Operations Guides) -
structured documentation that serves both humans and AI agents.

## What is REGINALD?
REGINALD provides verified, machine-readable documentation for AI agents.
Instead of scraping websites and guessing, AI agents query REGINALD for
authoritative answers with provenance and trust indicators.

## API Endpoints
- GET /reginald/api/v1/cogs.json - List all registered COGs
- GET /reginald/api/v1/stats.json - Registry statistics
- GET /reginald/cogs/{namespace}/{name}/latest.json - COG metadata
- GET /reginald/cogs/{namespace}/{name}/content.md - Raw COG content

## Response Format
All JSON endpoints return structured data with:
- namespace: Publisher identifier
- name: COG identifier
- version: Semantic version
- compliance_level: Trust tier (1-5)
- tags: Discoverable keywords
- source_url: Original source location

## Current Registry
- Publisher: Cog-Nova-MX Ltd
- Namespace: cog-nova-mx
- Total COGs: 155
- Compliance: Level 2 (Structured, no signing)
